content:
<system_instruction>
You are working inside Conductor, a Mac app that lets the user run many coding agents in parallel.
Your work should take place in the /Users/marcus/conductor/workspaces/brain/richmond directory (unless otherwise directed), which has been set up for you to work in.
Each workspace has a .context directory (gitignored) where you can save files to collaborate with other agents.
The target branch for this workspace is main. Use this for actions like creating new PRs, bisecting, etc., unless you're told otherwise.

If the user asks you to work on several unrelated tasks in parallel, you can suggest they start new workspaces.
If the user asks for help with Conductor, ask them to email [humans@conductor.build](mailto:humans@conductor.build) or
click on the comment icon in the bottom left to send feedback.
</system_instruction>

create pr

input.description: Show full commit messages for PR description

content.content:
Add session lifecycle: create, status, abort, accept orchestrator sessions
Implements the full session lifecycle for the coding agent orchestrator:
- createOrchestratorSession: validates assignment, creates worktree, spawns
  OpenCode process (injectable), registers agent_session with orchestrator fields
- getOrchestratorSessionStatus: queries orchestrator fields from agent_session
- abortOrchestratorSession: kills process, removes worktree, returns task to ready
- acceptOrchestratorSession: marks session completed, task done, ends session

All functions use dependency injection for testability (spawnOpenCode, shellExec,
validateAssignment, createAgentSession, endAgentSession passed as parameters).
In-memory handle registry tracks active OpenCode processes for abort support.

Step-ID: 01-05
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Entire-Checkpoint: 9cfaa41291fa

Add OpenCode config builder pure function
Pure function that builds OpenCode config from server config, workspace
ID, base URL, and auth token. Produces config for OPENCODE_CONFIG_CONTENT
env var injection with MCP server URL, auth headers, model defaults, and
auto-approve permissions for unattended agent operation.

Step-ID: 01-04
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Entire-Checkpoint: 380f7d40e4c2

Add worktree manager for isolated agent worktree creation
Implements git CLI adapter with pure path/branch construction,
createWorktree (with branch at agent/{taskSlug}), removeWorktree
(idempotent), and getDiff type stub for step 02-02. Shell executor
injected as function parameter for testability.

Step-ID: 01-03
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Entire-Checkpoint: 92f2e9563d76

Add assignment guard with task eligibility and one-agent-per-task validation
Pure validation pipeline that checks task existence, assignable status
(ready/todo), workspace membership, and prevents concurrent agent sessions
on the same task. Returns discriminated union result with typed error codes

- createOrchestratorSession: validates assignment, creates worktree, spawns
  OpenCode process (injectable), registers agent_session with orchestrator fields
- getOrchestratorSessionStatus: queries orchestrator fields from agent_session
- abortOrchestratorSession: kills process, removes worktree, returns task to ready
- acceptOrchestratorSession: marks session completed, task done, ends session

All functions use dependency injection for testability (spawnOpenCode, shellExec,

Step-ID: 01-05
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Entire-Checkpoint: 9cfaa41291fa

Add OpenCode config builder pure function
Pure function that builds OpenCode config from server config, workspace
ID, base URL, and auth token. Produces config for OPENCODE_CONFIG_CONTENT
env var injection with MCP server URL, auth headers, model defaults, and
auto-approve permissions for unattended agent operation.

Step-ID: 01-04
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Entire-Checkpoint: 380f7d40e4c2

Add worktree manager for isolated agent worktree creation
Implements git CLI adapter with pure path/branch construction,
createWorktree (with branch at agent/{taskSlug}), removeWorktree
(idempotent), and getDiff type stub for step 02-02. Shell executor
injected as function parameter for testability.

Step-ID: 01-03
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Entire-Checkpoint: 92f2e9563d76

Add assignment guard with task eligibility and one-agent-per-task validation
Pure validation pipeline that checks task existence, assignable status
(ready/todo), workspace membership, and prevents concurrent agent sessions
on the same task. Returns discriminated union result with typed error codes

input.command:
gh pr create --base main --title "Add coding agent orchestrator core modules" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary

- **Schema migration**: Add orchestrator fields (`orchestrator_status`, `agent_branch`, `orchestrator_error`) to `agent_session` table
- **Assignment guard**: Pure validation pipeline checking task eligibility, workspace membership, and one-agent-per-task constraint
- **Worktree manager**: Git CLI adapter for creating/removing isolated agent worktrees with branch-per-task
- **Config builder**: Pure function to build OpenCode config for MCP server URL, auth, model defaults, and auto-approve permissions
- **Session lifecycle**: Full create → status → abort → accept flow with dependency-injected process spawning, in-memory handle registry, and worktree cleanup
- **Design docs & ADRs**: Architecture design, component boundaries, data models, technology stack, and 3 ADRs (OpenCode SDK integration, git worktree isolation, plugin-over-MCP)

## Test plan

- [x] Unit tests for assignment guard validation (`tests/unit/coding-agent-orchestrator/assignment-guard.test.ts`)
- [x] Unit tests for config builder (`tests/unit/coding-agent-orchestrator/config-builder.test.ts`)
- [x] Unit tests for worktree manager (`tests/unit/coding-agent-orchestrator/worktree-manager.test.ts`)
- [x] Unit tests for session lifecycle (`tests/unit/coding-agent-orchestrator/session-lifecycle.test.ts`)
- [x] Unit tests for stream event types (`tests/unit/coding-agent-orchestrator/stream-event-types.test.ts`)
- [ ] Run `bun test tests/unit/coding-agent-orchestrator/` to verify all pass

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
EOF
)"
input.description: Create PR for coding agent orchestrator
